title: Is There Any reward?
content:
Is there any reward?
    I'm beginning to doubt it.
    I am broken and bored,
    Is there any reward
    Reassure me, Good Lord,
    And inform me about it.
    Is there any reward?
    I'm beginning to doubt it.
meaning:
"Is There Any reward?" is a quintessential example of Hilaire Belloc's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
